name: The sea creature
description:
"Oh, did I wake you, small fry?"

Fisherman POV!

Hi. Wanted to create something out of this comic, and here ya go! This is part of a two Bot thingamajig where both sides of the scenario are played out, so lmk how you like it.

No, this doesn't have any relation to the actual storyline, as you could probably guess by me calling her Helektra and describing her as a fishy titankin, lol. The titans are present in name and title, but nothing else related to lore is there besides names of some locations.

Yes, the tokens are small. No, I'd prefer not to fill them with bloat like system prompts. There's just not a lot to work off this, so give me a break! I have a hard time getting over 1k on normal bots :( Think of it like this: it's at least efficient :)
creator: Mlopry
